title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Xpressbees South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Xpressbees South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Distribution Manager looking for your next big career move? Xpressbees South Asia Partners in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Xpressbees South Asia Partners:
Xpressbees South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees South Asia Partners!
